text.title: Python FastAPI — Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed when python-fastapi is mis-applied, each with symptom, root cause, and concrete fix.

antipattern.description: One AsyncSession passed to multiple coroutines in asyncio.gather.
antipattern.reason: Root cause: Concurrent use corrupts session state; rare race conditions in prod. Fix: One session per coroutine — get a new one inside each task via Depends.

antipattern.description: ORM queries + business logic + serialisation all inside the route function.
antipattern.reason: Root cause: Untestable without HTTP; logic duplicated across endpoints. Fix: Move to service function; route stays thin.
Root cause: Worker process exhausts under load; response latency spikes. Fix: Move to Celery/Arq/Taskiq; return 202 Accepted.
Root cause: Field renames ship to production without anyone noticing. Fix: Snapshot the schema; fail CI on diff without bump.
